title: PEPE-PACK
description: This texture pack, thanks to the renaming of the totem on the anvil, allows you to make pepe frogs
body:
This texture pack uses 31 textures for the pepe frog totem. To make them, it is recommended to use [mod RP-Renames](https://modrinth.com/mod/rp-renames)
Also, in order for him to work at the fabric , you need [Cit resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) or [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) for forge.
[мой Дискорд](https://discord.gg/38RfrsaS)
